svg.title: BoluScan — System Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing user, Telegram, FastAPI, Vision AI, Calc Engine, PostgreSQL, Redis, and external nutrition REST APIs

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the user interact with the BoluScan bot?')
sendPrompt('How does Telegram Bot API work with webhooks?')
sendPrompt('What is aiogram and why use it?')
sendPrompt('What FastAPI endpoints does BoluScan need?')
sendPrompt('Which Vision AI API is best for food recognition?')
sendPrompt('How to calculate insulin dose from carbs?')
sendPrompt('What data should I store in PostgreSQL for a diabetes bot?')
sendPrompt('Why use Redis in a Telegram bot?')
sendPrompt('What nutrition REST APIs are available for free?')
